privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how {siteName} collects, uses, stores and protects data from users who access the platform, its applications and related services. By using the platform, you agree to the terms of this Policy.
privacy.section1_item1_desc: Name, e-mail, phone, profile photo, date of birth, Tax ID, Business ID, address and commercial information.
privacy.section1_item2_desc: Viewed events, interactions, purchase history, accesses, device, IP, approximate location and preferences.
privacy.section1_finance_desc: Payments are processed by external partners (Stripe). {siteName} does not store full bank card details.
privacy.section2_desc: Data may be used for: platform operation, authentication, payment processing, fraud prevention, behavioral analysis, content personalization, event recommendations, direct communication and compliance with legal obligations.
privacy.section3_desc: The platform provides public profiles containing: name, profile photo and registered public information. Follower relationships between users and companies are not publicly displayed to third parties.
privacy.section4_desc: {siteName} may share information with payment processors, anti-fraud services, technology providers and judicial authorities. The platform does not sell users' personal data.
privacy.section5_desc: We use cookies, pixels and analytical tools to assist in security, performance and personalization of the user experience.
privacy.section6_desc: We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect information. Despite efforts, no system is completely immune to failures or cyber attacks.
privacy.section7_desc: The user may request: access, update, correction or deletion of their data, as well as revocation of consents, respecting legal obligations and fraud prevention.
privacy.section8_desc: Data is kept while the account is active, there is an operational need or there are legal obligations and pending audits.
privacy.section9_desc: The platform does not have a mandatory minimum age. Minor users must use the services under the responsibility of their legal guardians.
privacy.section10_desc: Some used services may store or process information on servers outside of Brazil. By using the platform, the user agrees to this possibility.
privacy.section11_desc: For questions or requests related to privacy:
privacy.section12_desc: This Policy is governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil, including the General Personal Data Protection Law (LGPD).

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Welcome to {siteName}. By accessing or using the platform, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any condition described here, we recommend that you do not use the available services.
terms.section1_desc1: {siteName} is a digital platform for the disclosure, management and commercialization of events, available via website and applications for mobile devices.
terms.section1_desc2: The platform allows users to discover events, follow companies and public profiles, purchase tickets and interact with content related to registered events.
terms.section2_desc1: The use of the platform is allowed for anyone, without a mandatory minimum age.
terms.section2_desc2: To use certain functionalities, it may be necessary to register with true, complete and updated information.
terms.section2_responsibilities_item1: Maintaining the security of their account;
terms.section2_responsibilities_item3: Ensuring the veracity of the provided information.
terms.section2_desc3: {siteName} may suspend or remove accounts that present false, suspicious information or that violate these Terms.
terms.section3_desc1: The platform provides public profiles containing information such as: name, profile photo and registered public information.
terms.section3_desc2: The platform allows following people and companies. This relationship information is not publicly displayed to other users.
terms.section3_desc3: The use of personal data occurs according to applicable legislation and internal platform policies.
terms.section4_desc1: Only companies with a registered and approved Business ID may create events on the platform.
terms.section4_desc2: {siteName} may perform validation and verification processes of registered companies before releasing publication functionalities.
terms.section4_responsibilities_item5: The sale and execution of tickets.
terms.section5_desc1: The platform may sell digital tickets directly to users.
terms.section5_desc2: Payments are processed through the Stripe platform and its respective financial partners.
terms.section5_desc3: Users may request ticket cancellation and refund up to 30 days after purchase.
terms.section5_desc4: The request will be analyzed by the platform and, if considered legitimate, the refund will be carried out according to internal criteria.
terms.section6_desc1: The platform may provide financial balance and withdrawal request functionalities for producers.
terms.section6_desc2: Payments may depend on registration approval and anti-fraud analysis.
terms.section16_desc: The jurisdiction of Porto Alegre/RS is elected for the resolution of any disputes.

support.title: Help Center
support.subtitle: Get your questions answered about the platform.
support.not_found_desc: Our support team is ready to assist you.
